home.myFindingsDesc: View and manage your registered finds
home.sharedFindingsDesc: View finds that other users have shared with you
home.fundDatabaseDesc: Browse all registered finds without coordinates

myFindings.empty: You have no registered finds yet.
myFindings.searchPlaceholder: Search by object, dating or DimeId…
myFindings.selectToView: Click on a find to view and edit its details
myFindings.editIntro: Update your finding details now and keep space reserved for one or more images when media support is added.
myFindings.detailsDescription: Core details are grouped together so the media area can stay visible while you edit.
myFindings.locationDescription: Adjust coordinates here or place the marker directly on the map.
myFindings.mapHint: Tip: zoom in and click the map to update the location.
myFindings.imagesDescription: This new panel reserves room for a cover image and additional gallery shots.
myFindings.imagesDropzoneCopy: Select up to {{count}} images to upload with this finding.
myFindings.imagesFootnote: The layout already supports multiple images, with one larger lead image and room for additional thumbnails.
myFindings.openImageHint: Click a thumbnail to open the image in full size.
myFindings.shareEmpty: You do not have any confirmed friends to share with yet.
myFindings.shareLoadFailed: The current sharing settings could not be loaded. Please try again.
myFindings.shareSaveFailed: The sharing settings could not be saved. Please try again.

friendsPage.title: Friends
friendsPage.description: Add friends by email address by searching for existing users in Supabase. Friend requests and confirmations are saved to the database.
friendsPage.searchDescription: Enter an email address to look up an existing user and create a friend request.
friendsPage.searchHint: Only users that already exist in Supabase can be added. You cannot add yourself as a friend.
friendsPage.invalidEmail: Enter a valid email address to add a friend.
friendsPage.cannotAddSelf: You cannot add yourself as a friend.
friendsPage.notFound: No user with that email address was found.
friendsPage.searchFailed: The search could not be completed. Please try again.
friendsPage.loadFailed: The friends list could not be loaded. Please try again.
friendsPage.saveFailed: The friend request could not be saved. Please try again.
friendsPage.updateFailed: The friend request could not be updated. Please try again.
friendsPage.removeFailed: The friend request could not be removed. Please try again.
friendsPage.friendsDescription: Confirmed friendships and pending requests linked to your account.
friendsPage.emptyDescription: Search for an existing user's email address and add a friend to populate the list.
friendsPage.searchIdleDescription: Once you search for an email address, a local preview result will appear here.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Update your name here. Your email address is shown for reference and cannot be changed from this page.
